name: Paint Coverage Calculator
seo_title: Paint Coverage Calculator – Litres & Cans Needed
seo_description: Calculate how many litres and cans of paint you need. Enter room dimensions, number of coats and paint type to get exact paint quantity instantly.
description: Free online paint coverage calculator. Enter wall length and wall height to get instant results.
desc: Free online paint coverage calculator. Enter wall length and wall height to get instant results.
steps: Total wall area: 4 × 14 m × 2.5 m = 140 m² (for a square room — adjust for actual perimeter)
Subtract doors/windows: 3 × 2 m² = 6 m² → 134 m² paintable
mistakes: Using the floor area instead of the wall area
Forgetting that dark colours or stained walls need 3 coats instead of 2
Not accounting for texture — rough or porous walls absorb 20-30% more paint
formula_display: Paintable area = (perimeter × height) - doors_windows; Litres = area × coats ÷ coverage_per_litre
